headline: Karpathy Deconstructs the Mechanics of Modern Micro-GPT Architectures
lede: A look under the hood at the scaling laws governing minimal language models. We explore how streamlined parameter sets can yield surprising linguistic depth.

headline: Debating the Supply Chain Risk Designation for Anthropic
lede: The classification of leading AI labs as critical infrastructure suppliers remains a point of intense industry contention. We examine the regulatory implications of these oversight labels.
pullquote: Regulatory definitions must account for model agency rather than conflating technical providers with systemic physical risks

headline: Revisiting the Windows 95 Interface Usability Study of 1996
lede: A profound look back at the ergonomic principles that defined the desktop computing era. This seminal research captures the moment Windows pivoted toward the modern GUI.

headline: Obsidian Sync Introduces New Headless Client Capabilities
lede: Quietly moving data between environments just became a more automated affair. The headless implementation offers a streamlined, non-interactive method for maintaining personal knowledge vaults.

headline: Charting the Search for Genuine Personal Fulfillment
lede: Life optimization is often a process of subtraction rather than addition. These reflections offer a meditative account of finding balance in an era of constant productivity.

headline: The Hidden Mystery of the Frank Lloyd Wright H-Bomb
lede: Typography often holds secrets that escape the untrained eye. We investigate the curious and whimsical design choices that define this lesser-known architectural oddity.

headline: Holographic Light Fields Enable Rapid Volumetric Printing
lede: A breakthrough in synthesis methods allows for the near-instantaneous creation of complex 3D structures. By harnessing light fields, researchers have moved beyond the physical limitations of layering.

headline: Xmloxide Replaces Libxml2 With Memory-Safe Rust Implementation
lede: Following the sunset of a long-standing C library, this drop-in replacement ensures continued stability for modern stacks. We break down the performance gains achieved through this agent-assisted rewrite.

headline: Silencing Persistent System Upgrade Notifications
lede: User experience is suffering under the weight of relentless marketing pop-ups. Here is how to regain control of your desktop environment and clear the clutter.

headline: Microsoft Expands Hardware Portfolio With Specialized Windows 365 Mini PCs
lede: The shift toward cloud-based computing accelerates with a new form factor built for virtualized performance. These compact devices serve as the entry point for the next generation of thin-client office infrastructure.
